title: Nvidia Pitches DLSS 5 Again, Promises to Preserve 'Artistic Intent'
summary: Nvidia this week offered more details on DLSS 5, which uses AI to add photorealistic graphics to games. At SIGGRAPH, Nvidia made artistic intent a key part of its DLSS 5 showcase.
